deviations.description: The requirement in Version 2 obligates that information about the nature of blood donations must be provided to all donors before obtaining consent, not just first-time donors. The process model, as shown in the diagram on page 1, only requires this information to be provided to first-time donors. Therefore, the process does not provide this information to repeat donors before consent, directly violating the stricter requirement in Version 2.
process_model_reference: provide information of the nature of the blood donations

deviations.description: The modification of the activity name from 'provide_information_nature_of_blood_donations' to 'provide_information_on_nature_of_blood_donations' is a minor wording change and does not affect the compliance logic or process behavior.
process_model_reference: provide information of the nature of the blood donations
